title: viola × ritschliana
intro: Viola × ritschliana, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a hybrid plant belonging to the violet family and is often used in herbal medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Viola × ritschliana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular natural remedy for stress relief and sleep disorders. Herbal preparations of Viola × ritschliana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
